title: Add Duwit to business
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Duwit](https://duwit-45a37.web.app/) to business
- Duwit — Brief Description

Fixes #10389

gist.headline: Duwit joins the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Another beautiful app blooms in our community garden! Duwit has officially been added to the business showcase.
gist.summary: Added the community-built app Duwit to the business showcase and greenhouse directory.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore Duwit in the official Pollinations app showcase.
gist.visual_concept: The Pollinations bee (Polly) welcoming a new plant in a cozy greenhouse setting, representing the new community app addition. Polly is watering a fresh sprout in a lime green pot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene inside a warm, glowing greenhouse where the cute bee mascot is watering a fresh new code-plant sprouting from a lime green (#ecf874) pot. Soft pastel gradient background with sunlight filtering through the glass. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
